author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: chore: v5 (algolia/react-instantsearch#924)
body: * Add BaseWidget, update Breadcrumb and ClearAll * Update CurrentRefinements * Update widgets from Breadcrumb to Select * Update MultiRange, RangeInput * Update Pagination, PoweredBy, RefinementList, StarRating * Update Hits, HitsPerPage, Searchbox * Update Snippet, SortBy, Stats, Toggle * Fix Stats, Toggle, Update Panel, ScrollTo * Refacto classNames * Update widgets to add header/footer, update widgets stories * Remove unneeded classes from List * Update RangeSlider * Update Breadcrumb, ClearAll, CurrentRefinements, PoweredBy, SearchBox, StarRating * Remove unneeded CSS * Update CurrentRefinements, StarRating * Remove prettier changes on SCSS * Update PoweredBy * Use Fragment for Breadcrumb * Update Menu (remove unneeded CSS class) * Remove Fragment on Breadcrumb * Update tests * Refacto BaseWidget and classNames * Fix tests * Fix SearchBox * Fix wrong SearchBox PropTypes * Fix linting issues * Fix widgets and components from feedback * Update tests * Fix broken doc * Update CSS classes on guides * Fix a few CSS classes on guides * Remove context tests on RangeInput * Add tests to classNames * Update behaviour of the loadingIndicator * Update snapshots * ClearAll => ClearRefinements * Infinitehits => InfiniteResults * MultiRange => NumericMenu * Update snapshots * StarRating => RatingMenu * Update stories * Update snapshots * Revert "Infinitehits => InfiniteResults" This reverts commit d05f669e214f4289c9355a9141fcdd1ea5ba870a. * Add header and footer props info on widgets * Fix classNames returning ais-Widget-false * Results => Hits * Update styling guide * fix(List): always use same DOM for the SearchBox * fix(ScrollTo): use corret DOM props * fix(RatingMenu): avoid to bind events when link are disabled * fix(CurrentRefinements): handle simple & nest items * fix(RangeSlider): remove connector * chore: add IS.css as dev dependency * chore(storybook): remove useless postcss / sass loader * chore(storybook): add IS.css themes * fix(HitsPerPage): use correct className * fix(Hits):use wordBreak for avoid glitch with default theme * refactor(storybook): update style * fix(SearchBox): revert to previous props name * docs(Getting_started): update theme link * docs(Styling_widgets): update instructions * refactor(Panel): migrate on IS.css * feat(AutoHideContainer): add component * feat: migrate widget on Panel with AutoHideContainer * feat(stories): add Panel * docs(Panel): add section on canRefine * refactor: migrate ecommerce example on IS.css * refactor: migrate ecommerce-infinite example on IS.css * refactor: migrate media example on IS.css * refactor: migrate tourism example on IS.css * refactor: migrate material-ui example on IS.css * refactor: migrate default-theme example on IS.css * fix(docs): use correct loader * docs: split migration guide * docs: add migration guide v5 * fix: revert examples change * fix: disable lint for import named in examples * refactor: rename classNames for createClassNames * refactor: migrate on createClassNames * refactor(Panel): allow custom className on root * refactor(Panel): handle canRefine * feat(PanelCallbackHandler): add component for handle canRefine callback * docs(Panel): update usage & add missing props * chore: udpate IS.css to v6 * refactor: revert to Panel + canRefine * refactor: remove AutoHideContainer component * feat: add className on root element for all widgets * style(RefinementList): use class property for state * refactor(RatingMenu): always use a anchor element * refactor(connectRange): update default precision to 0 * refactor(Breadcrumb): move the default props related to rendering on the component * docs(Highligter): propType of separator * refactor(SearcBox): remove props suffix Component * fix(Breadcrumb): add space around separator * refactor: migrate on attribute * refactor: migrate on limit & showMoreLimit * refactor: migrate on searchable * refactor: migrate on padding & totalPages * refactor: migrate the example * refactor: migrate the docs * refactor(DefaultTheme): restore Panel * refactor(ecommerce): restore Panel * refactor(ecommerce-infinite): restore Panel * fix(example): remove extra key & whitespace * refactor: rename Toggle to ToggleRefinement * feat(ToggleRefinement): add test * refactor(ToggleRefinement): rewrite as SFC * chore: run Prettier * style(List): remove duplicate in propTypes * chore: remove theme package * chore: remove unused dependencies * chore: explicitly set error * chore: update IS.css to 6.0.1 * docs(migration): update migration steps section * docs(migration): update migration widgets section * docs(migration): add migration connectors section * docs(migration): reorder sections * fix(MigrationGuide): typo plurals * fix(MigrationGuide): add code black around classNames * fix(type): plurals * fix(MigrationGuide): update anchor * docs(MigrationGuide): add widgets near prop changes * docs(MigrationGuide): add styling note * docs(Styling): use CJS for Webpack configuration * docs(MigrationGuide): update phrasing * refactor(connectMenu): remove legacy API SFFV * refactor(connectRefinementList): remove legacy API SFFV * refactor(createConnector): remove legacy API SFFV * docs(MigrationGuide): add note about depreaction warning * Update Migration_guide_v5.md * refactor: remove searchParameters option on * docs(MigrationGuideV5): use emoji arrow * chore: update IS.css to 7.0.0 * refactor(CurrentRefinements): revert to the original behaviour * refacator(CurrentRefinements): convert to SFC * docs(MigrationGuideV5): revert CurrentRefinement behaviour * docs(CurrentRefinements): add missing classnames * feat(CurrentRefineemntStories): add RangeInput & NumericMenu stories * docs: udpate IS.css version on links * docs: update screenshots example * docs(ecommerce-infinite): fix product height * chore: update deploy script for the v5 * # [5.0.0-beta.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.4.2...v5.0.0-beta.0) (2018-01-30) This new version introduce a complete revamp of the naming and the HTML output of most widgets. The goal of this release is to provide improved semantics to our users. This release also introduces a new CSS naming convention which will be reused across all InstantSearch libraries. This will enable the possibility to develop cross-libraries CSS themes easily. You can find all the informations for the migration [in our documentation](https://react-instantsearch-beta.netlify.com/react-instantsearch/guide/migration_guide_v5). * chore(deps): update examples to react-instantsearch v5.0.0-beta.0 * docs: update banner color * docs: update banner for beta * docs: update banner color for a more distinct one * fix(header): udpate link use an absolute one * fix(docs): update link for theme * fix: remove the reset when algolia is loaded * docs(GettingStarted): go for the straightforward approach * docs: add precision about the reset & algolia theme * fix(CHANGELOG): reorder version * # [5.0.0-beta.1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.0.0-beta.0...v5.0.0-beta.1) (2018-02-06) Apply features & bug fixes from [v4.5.0](algolia/react-instantsearch#450-2018-02-06) & [v4.5.1](#451-2018-02-06) on the v5. See their CHANGELOG for more details. * chore(deps): update examples to react-instantsearch v5.0.0-beta.1 * chore(release): revert changes for the release
